transcript: Uh, hello, yeah, who is this?
H— How’s yourself? How ya doin’ up 'ere? [exhales]
Hi, Manual. Oh, I’m doin’ alright, I’m doin’ alright.
Oh, good, good. Yeah, I’m new here in the neighborhood.
You’ve probably heard my rooster some mornings. Sorry about that.
Although maybe not recently. He’s kinda gone on walkabout.
Well, I’m afraid it might’ve turned into a deadly game of chicken, if I’m being honest.
Well, hey, so anyway, they’re doin’ this improv lip syncing—

…and slumber party over by the fingernail salon, so you should really like it. I thought I’d notify ya or maybe you’re goin’ anyway, I’m not sure, but… [chuckles] [reverb]Thought I’d just mention it to ya, if you’d like to go. There’s a fragrance-booster button—
…that you can push at the end, so there is a fragrant component to it…
Okay, okay [laughs] Thanks for the heads- —
...for anyone who says there isn’t., ya know?
Yeah, thanks for the heads-up! That— That— [scoffs] That’s good to know.
I hope I haven’t thrown up a beige flag here or anything.
N— No, no, no, uh… No, I’d be okay with that.
Okay. What, would you rather listen to the thunder roar, or…?
That’s a tough one, if I’m bein’ honest. [shudders]
’Cause, I mean, I usually do most of my tasks blindfolded throughout the day, just so I can really hone in on my dexterity, ya know?
[laughs] It’s, um— [sniffs] Sorry, that seems— That seems smart. [unclear]—
So I’ll always see things through that lens, ya know?
Or— Or not see through it, ya know?
Hey, but, I would like to give you a poblano, okay?—
That’s a really nice gesture, actually. I think that’s my favorite pepper.

I do— I like chocolate, too. These are both amazing gestures. You’re new to the area, I gotta watch out for your rooster (you think he’s on a walkabout), you wanted to let me know about… the event near the nail salon (but it has a fragrant component), and as all part of this, you were gonna give me a poblano and some chocolate?
Th— This is amazing. Thank you. Great. Sign me up.
Dynamite, well have a great night. We’ll talk soon, thank you.
